title: xyridaceae
intro: The Xyridaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. Xyridaceae, commonly known as the yellow-eyed grass family, consists of approximately 44 species of plants native to the Americas. The plants in this family are typically small to medium in size, with yellow or green flowers that often have a distinctive yellow center. Xyridaceae species are often found in wetland or aquatic environments, where they can grow in dense clusters or as solitary plants.
